summary: Connectivity and density pass: wall_ratio 0.657 and monster_density_non_wall 0.259 fit a compact high-pressure MT0 style. The graph has a controlled central route plus left and right gated side routes; main_cycle_rank_ratio 0.121 does not indicate uncontrolled open-grid sprawl. min_route_to_exit has 3 enemies and 2 yellow doors, enough baseline pressure for this floor role.
